notes:
v2.3.2 (v2.3.0 Feature Update)
- Master Phone conversations now include GM tools for creating, editing, inserting, and deleting message records.
- Bank accounts can exchange configured virtual and actor-sheet currencies, and the phone can be resized from its bottom-right corner.
- External smartphone apps can register their own theme pickers in Settings.
- Banking and player-authored message changes now use stricter GM-side validation, with fixes for conversation state, alerts, and message order.
- Requires GlitchSmith Library v0.10.0 or newer.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.3.2
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v2.3.2 includes the full v2.3.0 feature update.

  • Master Phone conversations now include GM controls for creating, editing, inserting, and deleting message records.
  • Bank accounts can exchange configured virtual and actor-sheet currencies, and the phone can be resized directly from its bottom-right corner.
  • External apps can register theme pickers in Settings, including Smartphone - Shop App themes.
  • Banking and player-authored message changes use stricter GM-side validation, with fixes for conversation state, alerts, and message order.
  • GlitchSmith Library v0.10.0 or newer is required.
